message:
✨ Pre-select fish from calculator and skip to tank step (#22)

When navigating from the Tank Calculator via "Build a complete setup with
these fish", the wizard now:
- Parses the fish URL param (e.g. ?fish=Neon+Tetra:6,Guppy:3)
- Matches species names to real fish products in the catalog
- Pre-populates the fish step with matched products
- Skips directly to the Tank step (step 2) since fish are already chosen
- Shows a green banner on the fish step indicating pre-selection from calculator

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
